nativeProps: React.FieldsetHTMLAttributes<HTMLFieldSetElement> with children, value, and onChange reserved

compositionPolicy.items: RadioGroupItem requires a RadioGroup ancestor and a non-blank unique direct-item value; plain and card variants retain one input.
compositionPolicy.keyboard: Arrow, Home, and End move focus and selection exactly once across enabled native radios; horizontal arrows mirror in RTL.
compositionPolicy.targeting: Item className and style target the native input; rootClassName and rootStyle target the wrapper.
compositionPolicy.form: The group form attribute propagates to every item for external submission and reset.
